title: Tempting Smoky Russian Mushroom Tagine
description: Rich and juicy Russian dish featuring smoky flavors and heavy cream, adapted to be dairy-free friendly, cooked in a traditional tajine clay vessel.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in the tajine clay vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the non-dairy heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the tagine cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Stir in the chopped parsley and lemon juice.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
